rows.USen: A customer?!

<unk[3:0:260]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 77]>Hey, Grandpa!<unk[5:1]> I know it's been a while,
but we have a customer here!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:259]>抱歉啦～

技艺高超的工房锤子头
好像临时停业了～
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>我爷爷是领地里面
最厉害的锻造师，
不过自从发生了天地异变之后，
他一直都不开心……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:259]>不好意思呢～

看樣子以手藝自豪的工房錘子頭
突然店休了～
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>我爺爺是
領地裡最好的鐵匠，
不過自從天地異變發生之後，
他一直都不太開心……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:259]>ごめんね～

<Ruby={6:10}うでじまん>腕自慢の<Ruby={4:8}こうぼう>工房 ハンマーヘッドは
<Ruby={8:18}りんじきゅうぎょう>臨時休業みたいなの～
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>わたしのお<Ruby={2:4}じい>爺ちゃん
<Ruby={2:4}さと>里で<Ruby={4:8}いちばん>一番の <Ruby={6:6}かじし>鍛冶師なんだけどね
<Ruby={8:12}てんぺんちい>天変地異がおきてから
ずっと<Ruby={6:8}ふきげん>不機嫌なの…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]>Sorry about that.


The Hammerhead, our workshop that
we're so very proud of, is temporarily
closed.
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>As you know, my grandpa Dento is the
best blacksmith around.

But since the sludge started falling, he's
been in quite the foul mood.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>就算淤泥铺天盖地掉下来，
爷爷也还是这个样子～
要是有个万一，
就只能由我这个孙女扛着他逃跑啦……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>就算淤泥鋪天蓋地而下，
爺爺還是一樣不為所動的～
如果有個萬一，
只能由身為孫女的我扛著他逃命了……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>ヘドロが ドバッと<Ruby={2:2}ふ>降って<Ruby={2:2}き>来ても
お<Ruby={2:4}じい>爺ちゃんは こんな<Ruby={2:4}かん>感じなんだ～
これじゃ <Ruby={2:4}まん>万が<Ruby={2:4}いち>一のときは
<Ruby={2:4}まご>孫のわたしが <Ruby={2:4}かつ>担いで<Ruby={2:2}に>逃げなきゃダメだよね…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>Even when the sludge comes falling down,
my grandpa stays just like that.

If there's an emergency situation, as his
granddaughter, I'll have to find a way to
carry him to safety.
Ugh, the sludge is so thick.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>啊……<unk[5:0]>是客人～

欢迎来到玛尔图市场～<unk[5:0]>
我来为您做讲解～
方便的杂货店珊瑚礁
就算在这种情况下也依然营业哦～
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>技艺高超的工房锤子头……<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]><Ruby={6:10}うでじまん>腕自慢の<Ruby={4:8}こうぼう>工房 ハンマーヘッドは…<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:8}ざんねん>残念だけど やってないの…
<unk[3:0:256]><Ruby={4:6}しょこ>書庫で<Ruby={2:4}ふる>古い<Ruby={4:8}ぶんけん>文献を<Ruby={2:4}しら>調べてるのは フララットさん<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={4:8}かのじょ>彼女は<Ruby={4:8}てんしゅ>店主とかじゃなくて <Ruby={10:18}おうしつしょきかん>王室書記官で～す
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>Oh!<unk[5:0]> A customer!


Welcome to Marot Mart!<unk[5:0]> Let me tell you
about our fine facilities.

Our convenient general goods store, the
Coral Reef, is open. Yes, even during
these unusual times.
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 48]>Then there's our esteemed workshop,
The Hammerhead...<unk[5:0]>which is unfortunately
closed as of now.
<unk[3:0:256]>Oh, and the one reading dusty old texts in
the library is Laflat.<unk[5:0]> She's no shopkeeper,
but rather the royal secretary.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>欢迎来到玛尔图市场～

只能唱一唱淤泥之歌啦～

也沒有其他事可以做了～

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Welcome to Marot Mart!


That said, due to the sludge, we're not
getting many customers these days...

So basically the only thing I can do is sing
songs about the sludge.
What are you up to?
Goodbye.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>マルートは お<Ruby={2:6}きゃく>客さんの ご<Ruby={4:8}あんない>案内をしてるんだよ

ヘドロのことばっかり<Ruby={2:6}かんが>考えてて…

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 48]>I'm showing customers around. Except...


Well, the only problem is that no one's
coming around because of the sludge.

<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 48]>That junk seems to always be on my
mind these days.

I actually wrote a song about the sludge...
You wouldn't want to hear it, would you?
Sing! Sing! Sing!
Some other time.

<Ruby={2:4}うた>歌うはもちろん わたし <unk[5:0]>マルート！

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>よしっ！<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}うた>歌を<Ruby={2:2}き>聞いてもらったら <Ruby={4:6}げんき>元気でた！

<Ruby={2:2}き>気が<Ruby={4:4}めい>滅入っちゃった？

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 49]>Great! Then please listen up. AHEM.


I present a work with lyrics by Marot,<unk[5:0]>
music by Marot,<unk[5:0]> and performed by,

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 48]>♪Sludge!<unk[5:0]> Sludge!<unk[5:0]> It's filling up
the domain!♪

♪It's thick and gross and on

<unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 49]>♪Gills full o' mud! Fins thick with
sludge!♪

♪Even this song's kind of a trudge...
IT'S THE SLUDGE!♪

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>Kee-hee! There you go!<unk[5:0]> It actually
cheered me up having you listen to
my song!
<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>Wait... <unk[5:0]>You didn't lose heart because you
had to listen to that...right?

Um, if that's the case... Sorry about that.

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:22 71 114 101 101 116 105 110 103 95 48 48]>Hellooo! Welcome to Marot Mart!


Our convenient general goods store, the
Coral Reef, is open, but our esteemed
workshop, the Hammerhead, is closed.
<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>Alsooo... <unk[5:0]>Kee-hee...


I wrote a sequel to my sludge song!
You...want to hear it, right?
Encore! Encore!
What about the original?
Another time.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>那么就请听好！<unk[5:0]>
这是我反思过第1章后编写的可爱歌曲。
作词是玛尔图，<unk[5:0]>作曲是玛尔图，<unk[5:0]>
演唱者当然也是……<unk[5:0]>我玛尔图！
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 48]>黏黏糊糊～淤泥已经够多啦！<unk[5:0]>
黏黏糊糊～淤泥不可饶恕……♪
只要浇上干净的水～<unk[5:0]>
淤泥就会消失啦……♪
<unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 49]>黏黏糊糊～淤泥已经受够啦！<unk[5:0]>
黏黏糊糊～淤泥快快消失……♪
然后领地会怎样呢？<unk[5:0]>
当然是清洁溜溜啦～♪
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>……结束！<unk[5:0]>
这一首很可爱吧？
现实里淤泥还在往下掉，
清洁溜溜只能在歌里感受啦！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>那麼，就麻煩你聆聽一下囉！<unk[5:0]>
這是我從第1部的反思中試著製作出來的可愛歌曲。
作詞的是瑪爾圖，<unk[5:0]>作曲的是瑪爾圖，<unk[5:0]>
演唱的當然也是我，<unk[5:0]>瑪爾圖！
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 48]>黏黏稠稠，淤泥先生，已經過量，<unk[5:0]>
黏黏稠稠，淤泥先生，不可原諒……♪
只要灑上乾淨的水，<unk[5:0]>
淤泥先生就會消失……♪
<unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 49]>黏黏稠稠，淤泥先生，已經厭煩，<unk[5:0]>
黏黏稠稠，淤泥先生，已經退散……♪
如此一來，領地將會如何，<unk[5:0]>
領地將會，變得乾乾淨淨～♪
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>……結束了！<unk[5:0]>
是一首很可愛的歌吧？
雖然現實中淤泥還是落個不停，一點都不乾淨，
不過至少在歌曲裡面乾乾淨淨的也好！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>じゃあ <Ruby={2:2}き>聞いてもらっちゃお！<unk[5:0]>
パート1の<Ruby={4:8}はんせい>反省から かわいい<Ruby={2:4}うた>歌にしてみました
<Ruby={4:6}さくし>作詞マルート <unk[5:0]><Ruby={4:10}さっきょく>作曲マルート <unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={2:4}うた>歌うはもちろん わたし <unk[5:0]>マルート！
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 48]>どろどろ へどろさん もうたくさん<unk[5:0]>
どろどろ へどろさん もうゆるさん…♪
きれいな<Ruby={2:4}みず>水 ブッかけりゃ<unk[5:0]>
へどろさんは <Ruby={2:2}き>消えちまう…♪
<unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 49]>どろどろ へどろさん もうさんざん<unk[5:0]>
どろどろ へどろさん もうたいさん…♪
そうして<Ruby={2:4}さと>里は どうなった<unk[5:0]>
ピッカピカに なったとさ～♪
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>…おしまいっ！<unk[5:0]>
かわいい<Ruby={2:4}うた>歌だったでしょ？

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:14 67 104 97 116 95 48 49]>YES! OK, listen up.<unk[5:0]> After reflecting on
the original, I decided to make this one
much more adorable. AHEM.
I present a new work with lyrics by Marot,<unk[5:0]>
music by Marot,<unk[5:0]> and performed by,
<unk[5:0]>you guessed it, <unk[5:0]>me! Marot!
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 48]>♪Icky, yicky sludge, your time is through!
Icky, yicky sludge, we will stop you!♪

♪When we throw water in your face,
you disappear without a trace!♪

<unk[4:0:20 72 117 109 109 105 110 103 95 48 49]>♪Filthy sludge, you won't be spared!
Filthy sludge, you're running scared!♪

♪Hey now! You! You know what I mean?
Our sweet domain is finally clean!♪

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>That's the song!<unk[5:1]> It really was adorable,
wasn't it?

In reality, the sludge is still falling, and
it's not clean in the domain yet. But,
you know, artistic license and all that.

<unk[3:0:259]><unk[4:0:10 84 104 105 110 107]>Oh, that?


<unk[3:0:265]>Well, in retrospect it was a little too dark,
so I canceled it.<unk[5:0]> That song is no more!

<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>Let's throw the silly ol' original in the
river. I'll sing the sequel for you instead!

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:5]>總覺得呢～<unk[5:0]>
雜貨店的和恩最近有點奇怪！
<unk[3:0:259]>嘴裡一直蟹……蟹……<unk[5:0]>地念念有詞！

<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>他應該沒事吧～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:5]>なんだかね～<unk[5:0]>
ヘオンさんが <Ruby={4:8}さいきん>最近 <Ruby={2:4}へん>変なの！
<unk[3:0:259]>カニ… カニ…<unk[5:0]> って ぶつぶつ<Ruby={2:2}い>言ってて！<PageBreak><unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]><Ruby={6:12}だいじょうぶ>大丈夫かな～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:5]>If you ask me,<unk[5:0]> Cleff from the general store
has been acting odd recently.

<unk[3:0:259]>Crab this...<unk[5:0]> Shell that...<unk[5:1]> He's mumbling
stuff like that all the time these days!

<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>I wonder if something's wrong...

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:5]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>ヘオンさん <Ruby={6:12}だいじょうぶ>大丈夫かな…<PageBreak><unk[3:0:259]>カニ… カニ…<unk[5:0]> って
ずっと ぶつぶつ<Ruby={2:2}い>言ってるんだけど…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:5]><unk[4:0:6 83 97 100]>I wonder if something is up with Cleff from
the general store.

<unk[3:0:259]>Crab this and shell that...<unk[5:0]> He keeps
mumbling weird stuff like that!

<unk[3:0:0]>Did you happen to talk to Cleff?


<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 49]>Was he saying stuff like "crab" and "shell"
and "pinch"? Things like that?

rows.JPja:
<Size=80><Size=100><unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>えっ！<unk[5:0]>
カニを そんなにたくさん！？<Size=80>
<Size=100>は～…<unk[5:0]>
カニカニ<Ruby={2:2}い>言ってたのは そういうことかぁ<Size=80><Size=100>
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>そんなに<Ruby={2:2}す>好きなら わたしもカニを<Ruby={2:2}み>見つけて
ヘオンさんに <Ruby={2:2}さ>差し<Ruby={2:2}い>入れてあげようっと！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:267]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 49]>HUH?! He wanted that many crabs?


*sigh*<unk[5:0]> So that's why he was saying all of
that weird crabby stuff.

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 48]>If he likes crabs that much, then I'll have
to go find some for him.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>对了！<unk[5:0]>
有个好消息～！
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>锻造师罗司里爷爷说，
终于能做点像样的工房工作了！
说不定会做出什么来哦～！？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:263]>對了！<unk[5:0]>
我有好消息要告訴你～！
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>鐵匠羅司里爺爺說他終於能做些
專業工房會做的工作了！
他也許會鍛造出什麼作品喔～！？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:263]>そうそう！<unk[5:0]>
いい<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話があるの～！
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]><Ruby={6:6}かじし>鍛冶師の ロスーリお<Ruby={2:4}じい>爺ちゃんが
やっと<Ruby={4:8}こうぼう>工房らしい<Ruby={4:6}しごと>仕事ができるって<Ruby={2:2}い>言ってたよ！
<Ruby={2:4}なに>何か<Ruby={2:4}つく>作るのかも～！？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:263]>Wahoo! I have something wonderful to
tell you!

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>My grandpa Dento, the great blacksmith,
said that he can finally do some work at
his workshop.
Maybe he'll make you something!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]>在玛尔图市场<unk[5:0]>大省一笔～！♪

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>欢迎来到可能是拉聂尔地区最大规模的商店——<unk[5:1]>
玛尔图市场！
方便的杂货店珊瑚礁和
技艺高超的工房锤子头正在营业哦～
<unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>我玛尔图来为客人讲解～♪
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:257]>瑪爾圖市場，<unk[5:0]>買而划算！♪

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>歡迎光臨或許是拉聶爾地區最具規模的店家，<unk[5:1]>
瑪爾圖市場！
便利的雜貨店珊瑚礁以及
以手藝自豪的工房錘子頭都有營業～
<unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>由我瑪爾圖來為你介紹～♪
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:257]>マルートマートで まるっと お<Ruby={2:4}とく>得っ！♪

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>ラネール<Ruby={4:6}ちほう>地方で たぶん<Ruby={6:14}さいだいきゅう>最大級のお<Ruby={2:4}みせ>店<unk[5:0]>
マルートマートへ ようこそ！
<Ruby={4:6}べんり>便利なよろず<Ruby={2:2}や>屋 コーラル・リーフと<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={6:10}うでじまん>腕自慢の<Ruby={4:8}こうぼう>工房 ハンマーヘッドが <Ruby={6:16}えいぎょうちゅう>営業中ですよ～
<unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>わたし マルートが ご<Ruby={4:8}あんない>案内しま～す♪
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]>A fabulous deal awaits you at...<unk[5:0]>
♪Marot Mart!♪

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:10 72 97 112 112 121]>Welcome to Marot Mart, <unk[5:1]>the best store
in Lanayru! I mean, as far as I know,
anyway...
Our convenient general goods store,
the Coral Reef, and our esteemed
workshop, the Hammerhead, are open!
<unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>♪As you know, I'm Marot. Allow me to tell
you all about theeem!♪

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]>欢迎来到玛尔图市场！
这里不仅有杂货店还有工房哦～
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:257]>歡迎光臨瑪爾圖市場！
無論雜貨店、工房，這邊應有盡有喔～
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:257]>マルートマートへ ようこそ！<unk[5:0]>
よろず<Ruby={2:2}や>屋さんと <Ruby={4:8}こうぼう>工房がそろってますよ～
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]>Welcome to Marot Mart! Here you'll find
our general goods store and workshop.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>方便的杂货店珊瑚礁
进货了好多美味的鱼！

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>便利的雜貨店珊瑚礁

則是能鍛造強大的武器喔～！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]><Ruby={4:6}べんり>便利なよろず<Ruby={2:2}や>屋の コーラル・リーフは

<Ruby={6:10}うでじまん>腕自慢の<Ruby={4:8}こうぼう>工房 ハンマーヘッドは

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:257]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Our convenient general goods store,
the Coral Reef, has procured a bunch
of yummy fish!
And our esteemed workshop,
the Hammerhead, is open and ready
to craft some incredible weapons!

rows.JPja: あっ！ <Ruby={4:6}ふくき>服着てない！
rows.USen: Where are your clothes?

rows.USen:

huh? Must have been chilly.
